message:
fix(ui): prevent race condition in BackgroundWorker.process()

Add check for WorkerStopped state after buildSnapshot() completes.
Previously, if Stop() was called during processing, the subsequent
state = WorkerIdle would overwrite the stopped state, potentially
spawning more work after the worker should have stopped.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -211,6 +211,11 @@ func (w *BackgroundWorker) process() {
 	snapshot := w.buildSnapshot()
 
 	w.mu.Lock()
+	// Check if stopped while we were processing - don't overwrite stopped state
+	if w.state == WorkerStopped {
+		w.mu.Unlock()
+		return
+	}
 	w.snapshot = snapshot
 	wasDirty := w.dirty
 	w.state = WorkerIdle
